description: Plackett-Burman screening DOE matrix: main effects only in very few runs, returned in real units with a randomized run order.
rules: read-only — reads a JSON spec, writes a CSV; mutates no live service
seeded — the run order is reproducible from SPEC_JSON.seed
run count is the next multiple of 4 above k (extra dummy columns are dropped)
usage: Set SPEC_JSON to a JSON file with keys: factors (required dict {name:[low,high]}), randomize (bool, default true), seed (int). Output: experimental_runs.csv under record_store.
limitation: Two-factor interactions are heavily confounded with main effects — use it to screen the vital few, not to model interactions. When pyDOE3 is absent the porter writes an empty {} artifact.
